title: Armor Reclaimer
description: Smelt armor for full ingots - reclaim your metals effortlessly!
body:
# Armor Reclaimer

Armor Reclaimer is a simple yet powerful mod that makes metal recovery smarter.  
Smelt your iron and gold armor - including **iron and gold horse armor**—to reclaim full ingots, while tools and weapons still yield nuggets.

Have you ever traded with villagers or explored mineshafts, finding tons of armor you’ll never wear? Armor Reclaimer ensures that all that extra gear doesn’t go to waste - turn it into valuable materials and keep your resources efficient.

This rewards careful crafting and clever resource management, making every piece of metal count!

## Features

- Smelt iron and chainmail armor → iron ingot
- Smelt gold armor → gold ingot
- Smelt iron and gold horse armor → iron/gold ingot  
- Smelt tools and weapons → nuggets  
- Efficient resource recovery from old equipment  
- Perfect for players who collect armor via trading or looting
